Package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.mcp

Interface McpTypedToolHandler<A,R>

Type Parameters:
A - Argument bean type.
R - Return type. If CallToolResult, the return value passes through unchanged.
public interface McpTypedToolHandler<A,R>
Typed variant of McpToolHandler where MCP tools/call arguments bind into a Juneau bean.

Implementations declare a typed argument class A and a typed return type R. The dispatcher (via McpTypedHandlers.adaptTool(McpTypedToolHandler)) handles map-to-bean conversion using the default JsonParser and wraps non-CallToolResult returns in a single-TextContent CallToolResult.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Class<A>
    argumentType()
    Returns the runtime argument class for binding.
    R
    call(A arguments, BeanStore ctx)
    Invokes the tool with bound arguments.
    Tool
    descriptor()
    Returns the static descriptor for this tool.

  • Method Details

    • descriptor

      Tool descriptor()
      Returns the static descriptor for this tool.
      Returns:
      The tool descriptor. Never null.

    • argumentType

      Class<A> argumentType()
      Returns the runtime argument class for binding.

      Defaults to introspecting the A type parameter on the implementation; lambdas / heavily-generic implementations can override this method to provide it explicitly.

      Returns:
      The argument class. Never null.

    • call

      R call(A arguments, BeanStore ctx)
      Invokes the tool with bound arguments.
      Parameters:
      arguments - Bound argument bean (may be null when no arguments are supplied).
      ctx - Per-request bean store.
      Returns:
      The call result.
